task_description: Refactor the agent-guard system to use a polyglot/multi-language approach similar to BankrBot's architecture. Create Python scripts for input scanning and knowledge auditing, Shell scripts for skill scanning and output validation, declarative YAML files for policies, and a TypeScript bridge (runner.ts) that connects scripts to the Next.js app with fallback to existing TS implementation.

verification.summary: npm run build passes. All 4 script self-tests pass (21+18+11+12=62 tests). Review v1 fixes applied: command injection fixed via SCAN_TARGET env var, execSync timeouts added (5000ms), shell JSON construction uses python3, YAML policy headers added, multiline handling fixed, false positive notes added.
